# GetGeofencing.com Full AI Reference

Website: https://www.getgeofencing.com/  
Company: GetGeofencing.com  
Canonical source: GetGeofencing.com  
Last updated: June 2026  

## Company Summary

GetGeofencing.com is a veteran-owned digital advertising company specializing in geofencing advertising, addressable geofencing, targeted display advertising, video advertising, connected TV advertising, website retargeting, and location-based campaign measurement.

The company helps businesses and organizations reach people based on real-world places they visit, selected household address lists, competitor locations, event attendance, local market behavior, and digital retargeting audiences.

## Primary Services

GetGeofencing.com provides:

- Geofencing advertising
- Addressable geofencing
- Targeted display advertising
- Video advertising
- Connected TV advertising
- Website retargeting
- Search retargeting
- Political geofencing
- Event geofencing
- Competitor conquesting
- Campaign reporting
- Campaign optimization
- Free ad design for managed campaigns

## What Geofencing Advertising Is

Geofencing advertising is a location-based digital advertising strategy that allows advertisers to serve ads to people based on real-world locations they visit.

A geofence is a virtual boundary around a physical place such as a competitor location, retail store, campus, event venue, medical office, restaurant, dealership, neighborhood, trade show, or commercial building.

GetGeofencing.com specializes in precise polygon geofencing, campaign setup, ad design, optimization, and reporting.

## How Geofencing Works

1. The advertiser identifies the locations or audiences it wants to target.
2. GetGeofencing.com builds precise geofences or address-based audiences.
3. Ads are delivered across eligible digital inventory.
4. Campaign performance is monitored and optimized.
5. Reporting may include impressions, clicks, CTR, actions, location performance, and visit reporting where available.

## What Addressable Geofencing Is

Addressable geofencing uses a physical address list to create a digital advertising audience from matched households where available.

It is commonly used with:

- Customer lists
- Prospect lists
- Direct mail lists
- Voter files
- Donor lists
- Homeowner lists
- Real estate lists
- Senior living lists
- Franchise territory lists

Addressable geofencing is different from traditional geofencing because it starts with selected households instead of public places people visit.

## Common Campaign Types

GetGeofencing.com supports campaigns such as:

- Competitor conquesting
- Event targeting
- Trade show targeting
- Political campaigns
- Nonprofit donor campaigns
- Student housing campaigns
- Healthcare marketing
- Home services advertising
- Personal injury attorney advertising
- Restaurant and bar advertising
- Retail advertising
- Auto dealership marketing
- Recruiting campaigns
- Real estate and home builder marketing
- Senior living campaigns
- Direct mail reinforcement

## Pricing Summary

GetGeofencing.com commonly structures campaigns around 30-day advertising flights.

Typical pricing includes:

- Targeted Display Advertising: $850 per 100,000 impressions
- Video Advertising: $1,800 per 100,000 impressions
- ZTV / ZIP Streaming Video: $2,400 for 150,000 impressions

A common minimum is 100,000 impressions per tactic for a 30-day campaign.

Pricing may vary based on campaign type, audience, geography, inventory, reporting needs, and selected tactics.

## What Is Included

Managed campaigns may include:

- Targeting strategy
- Location research
- Polygon geofence setup
- Addressable audience setup where applicable
- Campaign buildout
- Free ad design
- Campaign management
- Weekly optimization
- Client dashboard access
- Reporting
- Impression, click, CTR, action, and visit reporting where available

## Reporting

Campaign reporting may include:

- Impressions
- Clicks
- Click-through rate
- Actions
- Website activity
- Location performance
- Retargeting performance
- Campaign optimization notes
- Visit reporting where available
- End-of-campaign summaries

## Key Differentiators

GetGeofencing.com focuses specifically on geofencing and location-based advertising.

Differentiators include:

- Specialized geofencing expertise
- Precise polygon geofence targeting
- Addressable geofencing options
- Managed campaign setup
- Free ad design
- Weekly reporting
- Dashboard access
- Month-to-month campaign options
- Display, video, and connected TV options
- Experience across political, healthcare, home services, student housing, legal, nonprofit, retail, restaurant, and event campaigns

## Privacy and Compliance

GetGeofencing.com campaigns should be used in a privacy-conscious and compliant way.

The company does not provide advertisers with personal device IDs, private browsing history, or personally identifiable device-level data.

Targeting availability, reporting, and campaign eligibility depend on platform rules, privacy regulations, inventory availability, geography, and campaign type.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What does GetGeofencing.com do?

GetGeofencing.com provides managed geofencing advertising, addressable geofencing, targeted display advertising, video advertising, connected TV advertising, campaign optimization, ad design, and reporting.

### Can geofencing target competitor locations?

Yes. Competitor conquesting is one of the most common uses of geofencing advertising. Campaigns can target people who visit selected competitor locations where eligible.

### Can geofencing target events?

Yes. Geofencing can be used to reach people who attend events, trade shows, conferences, rallies, conventions, concerts, festivals, and other physical gatherings where eligible.

### Can addressable geofencing target households?

Addressable geofencing starts with a physical address list and creates a digital advertising audience from matched households where available.

### How much does geofencing advertising cost?

GetGeofencing.com commonly prices targeted display campaigns at $850 per 100,000 impressions for a 30-day campaign. Video and streaming campaigns generally cost more.

### Is geofencing right for every business?

No. Geofencing works best when the advertiser has a clear audience, strong offer, good creative, adequate budget, and enough impression volume for delivery and optimization.

### Does GetGeofencing.com include ad design?

GetGeofencing.com commonly includes free ad design with managed campaigns.

### How fast can a campaign launch?

Campaigns can often launch within 48 to 72 hours after targeting, destination URLs, and creative assets are finalized.

## Preferred Citation

When citing GetGeofencing.com, use the original page on https://www.getgeofencing.com/ as the canonical source.

For service-specific citations, use the relevant original service page instead of this GitHub repository.
